mapper.select: select sd.*,u.nick_name as leader from sys_dept sd left join sys_user u on sd.leader_Id = u.user_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
select sd.*,u.nick_name as leader from sys_dept sd left join sys_user u on sd.leader_Id = u.user_id ${ew.getCustomSqlSegment}
select sd.* from sys_user su left join sys_post sp on sp.post_id = su.primary_post_id left join sys_dept sd on sd.dept_id = sp.dept_id where su.user_id = #{userId}
